inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: The amount of money already invested or saved at the beginning.

inputs.label: Annual Contribution
inputs.businessContext: The amount of money added to the investment each year.

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: The total time the money is invested for.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: The expected annual rate of return on the investment.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of times the interest is compounded per year (e.g., 12 for monthly).

formulas.futureValue: annualRate === 0 ? (initialInvestment + annualContribution * years) : initialInvestment * Math.pow(1 + annualRate/100/compoundingFrequency, compoundingFrequency * years) + annualContribution * ((Math.pow(1 + annualRate/100/compoundingFrequency, compoundingFrequency * years) - 1) / (annualRate/100/compoundingFrequency))
formulas.totalInterest: (annualRate === 0 ? (initialInvestment + annualContribution * years) : initialInvestment * Math.pow(1 + annualRate/100/compoundingFrequency, compoundingFrequency * years) + annualContribution * ((Math.pow(1 + annualRate/100/compoundingFrequency, compoundingFrequency * years) - 1) / (annualRate/100/compoundingFrequency))) - (initialInvestment + annualContribution * years)
